summaryAm: ትንሽ ነገር እንኳን ለአንዳንድ ሰው ሊሰማ እንደሚችል የሚያሳይ ጨዋ ታሪክ።
moralAm: ሰዎች በተለያዩ መንገድ ይሰማቸዋል፤ መስማትና መከባበር ደግነት ነው።

source.name: Hans Christian Andersen tale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: በዝናብ ምሽት አንዲት እንግዳ ልዕልት ወደ ቤተመንግሥት መጣች።
pages.textEn: On a rainy evening, a visiting princess came to the palace.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Princess and the Pea, page 1: በዝናብ ምሽት አንዲት እንግዳ ልዕልት ወደ ቤተመንግሥት መጣች።

pages.textAm: ቤተሰቡ ሙቅ ልብስ፣ ሻይ እና ለስላሳ አልጋ አዘጋጀላት።
pages.textEn: The family prepared warm clothes, tea, and a soft bed for her.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Princess and the Pea, page 2: ቤተሰቡ ሙቅ ልብስ፣ ሻይ እና ለስላሳ አልጋ አዘጋጀላት።

pages.textAm: ከአልጋው በታች ትንሽ አተር ተረስቶ ነበር።
pages.textEn: A tiny pea had been forgotten beneath the bed.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Princess and the Pea, page 3: ከአልጋው በታች ትንሽ አተር ተረስቶ ነበር።

pages.textAm: ጠዋት ልዕልቷ “አንድ ትንሽ ነገር እንዳለ ተሰማኝ” አለች በቀስታ።
pages.textEn: In the morning, the princess gently said she had felt something small.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Princess and the Pea, page 4: ጠዋት ልዕልቷ “አንድ ትንሽ ነገር እንዳለ ተሰማኝ” አለች በቀስታ።

pages.textAm: ሁሉም ተገረሙ፣ እሷ በጣም ስሜታዊ እና ጥንቃቄ ያላት መሆኗን ተረዱ።
pages.textEn: Everyone was surprised and understood that she was very sensitive and careful.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Princess and the Pea, page 5: ሁሉም ተገረሙ፣ እሷ በጣም ስሜታዊ እና ጥንቃቄ ያላት መሆኗን ተረዱ።

pages.textAm: ቤተሰቡ ልዕልቷን በክብር ተቀበለ፣ እሷም ሌሎችን በትኩረት መስማትን አስተማረች።
pages.textEn: The family welcomed the princess with respect, and she taught them to listen closely to others.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Princess and the Pea, page 6: ቤተሰቡ ልዕልቷን በክብር ተቀበለ፣ እሷም ሌሎችን በትኩረት መስማትን አስተማረች።

pages.textAm: ንግሥቲቱ አልጋውን እያዘጋጀች “እንግዳችን ደኅና እንዲያርፍ እንፈልጋለን” አለች። ልጆቹም ለስላሳ መሸፈኛዎችን አመጡ።
pages.textEn: The queen and children prepared a warm, soft bed for their guest.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Queen and children preparing a soft palace bed with blankets on a rainy night.

pages.textAm: ትንሹ አተር በመሸፈኛዎች መካከል ተሸፍኖ ቀረ። ማንም አላየውም፣ ነገር ግን ልዕልቷ ነገሮችን በጥልቅ ትሰማ ነበር።
pages.textEn: The tiny pea stayed hidden, though the princess noticed small feelings deeply.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Tiny green pea tucked beneath soft palace mattresses.

pages.textAm: ሌሊቱ ሲያልፍ ልዕልቷ በጣም ተጨንቃ አልነበረችም። እሷ በቀስታ ተነስታ መስኮቱን ተመለከተች እና ዝናቡን አዳመጠች።
pages.textEn: During the night, the princess quietly listened to the rain by the window.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Princess in a cozy room listening to rain beside a tall palace window.

pages.textAm: ጠዋት ሁሉም “እንዴት አደርሽ?” ብለው በትህትና ጠየቋት። ልዕልቷም የተሰማትን ሳትፈራ በደግነት ነገረች።
pages.textEn: In the morning, the princess kindly shared what she had felt.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Princess speaking gently with the palace family at breakfast.

pages.textAm: ቤተሰቡ አተሩን ሲያገኙ ተሳቁ እና ተማሩ። “ትንሽ ነገር ለአንዱ ትልቅ ሊሆን ይችላል” ብለው ተስማሙ።
pages.textEn: When the family found the pea, they learned that small things can feel big to someone else.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Palace family finding a tiny pea and smiling with understanding.
